PP
Error Database

Power Platform Error Codes and Resolution Database

Search across Power Automate, Dataverse, Power Apps, and desktop-flow errors. Partial matches, full codes, HTTP statuses, symptoms, causes, and resolution steps are all included. Current production build: 2,000 SEO article pages.

Coverage

0Total errors
0High severity
0Product areas
0Sources

Search Tips

Try terms like 401, DLP, connection, Dataverse, timeout, wrap, trigger, or session. The search also soft-matches partial phrases such as auth fail or bad req.
